title: Dyflon Non-Stick Coating Frying Pan with Glass Lid Suitable for Induction Hob (24 cm)
features: Heats Quickly & Evenly - Made of professional grade aluminum alloy that conducts heat quickly and evenly with precise temperature control and no hot spot. Anti-warp base of the granite frying pan provides outstanding warp resistance and even heat distribution. this non-stick frying pans is designed for professional multiple cooking use and allows you fry up Conveniently Designed. The non-stick frying pan is made with a flat bottom which allows it to be placed evenly over heat source.
SUITABILITY - Stuffs Direct Non-stick frying pan are suitable for cooking on electric hobs, gas hobs, induction hobs and hot plates. The stylish, black No-Stick coating will complement any kitchen.

STAY COOL HANDLE & SEE THROUGH LID- The non-stick pan has a plastic handle, which is comfortable to grip and ergonomic, and keeps it cool during cooking. The see through glass lid allows you to check cooking progress while locking in flavour.

NON-STICK & CLEAN UP A BREEZE: This skillet with lid comes with superior quality PFOA/LEAD/CADMIUM FREE, this allows your food to cook more evenly to keep food from sticking to the surface. Less oil or butter needed makes for Healthier Cooking and Eating and provides for hassle-free, 1-2-3 clean-up
Please read the instructions before using for the first time to avoid unnecessary damage to the pan
description: Product Description Die Cast Fry pan with lid. tem Weight 454 g Product Dimensions 5 x 20 x 20 cm Diameter 24 centimetres Material Non Stick, Steel, Plastic Special Features covered: helper handle Box Contains 1 Non stick Frying pan with lid
